title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Don't Allow is selected
scenario: User taps "Don't Allow" on location sharing during first launch, then accesses Find My Device via hamburger menu and sees "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, persisting after app restart.
steps: Launch the app for the first time.
When the location sharing dialogue appears, tap "Don't Allow".
Observe the permission window that appears.
expected: A permission window with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options should appear when accessing FMD via the hamburger menu. This behavior should persist after restarting the app.
